text:
There once was a frog who never got any calls on his dating phone. One day, a handsome prince visited the swamp. The frog was utterly smitten.

The prince decided to play a prank. One evening, he threw his cellphone into a pond. Froggy emerged, and they spent all evening talking.

When dawn came, the prince couldn't remember his phone number. Froggy, having missed several calls on that lovely evening, decided he'd fallen in love.

They spent their days plotting escapes from their rural kingdom, and their evenings sharing fairy tales.

Froggy realized he preferred the prince. The prince, surprisingly gentle.

They got married. Froggy had seven daughters and a son.

From that day on, every lost phone began its adventures in a beautiful garden filled with talking flowers. They had a lovely little kingdom together.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
